title: AI Agent Marketplace
description: Led the development of an enterprise AI Agent Marketplace, launching 300+ ready-to-deploy agents across HR, IT, and Finance domains. Built on top of Moveworks' agentic AI platform, enabling enterprises to automate complex workflows with plug-and-play AI agents.

title: Moveworks Self-Service Platform
description: Ideated and built a 0→1 Self-Service platform enabling enterprise admins to configure and manage their AI assistant without engineering support. Achieved 40% customer admin adoption in year one and reduced go-live cycle from 2 months to 25 days.

title: Product Insights — Sprinklr
description: Launched a new SKU within Sprinklr's Social Listening module that provided AI-powered product insights from social conversations. Contributed $15M in new ARR within 2 years of launch.

title: Modern Research Lite (PLG)
description: Designed and launched the self-serve Lite version of Sprinklr's Modern Research on product-led-growth principles. Onboarded 4200+ users (3000+ unique brands) across 50+ countries.

title: Ola Share Growth Engine
description: Built data-driven growth strategies for Ola Share and Ola Micro categories. Designed incentive schemes for 60k+ cab fleet and grew Ola Share by 100% and Ola Micro by 60% in one year.

title: adityashankar.in
description: This portfolio website — built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Features a markdown-based blog, project showcase, and CRED-inspired dark design aesthetic.
